name: COPREM OS
description: A fully automated personal AI operating system built by เปรม, orchestrating n8n workflows, LiteLLM LLM routing, Postgres with pgvector, Redis, and a Next.js dashboard — all triggered via Telegram bot and managed with Docker Compose. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
